news.title: GPT-5.5 dominates $1,500 LLM hacking test while Gemini refuses to even try
news.description: A security researcher spent $1,500 running 13+ AI models against a deliberately vulnerable app. GPT-5.5 led with a 70% solve rate, DeepSeek V4 Pro solved it for $0.62 per attempt, and Gemini refused to engage almost entirely.

news.title: Verified Machine Learning Infrastructure
news.description: The authors determine whether formal methods—using mathematical techniques to reason about software behavior and, potentially, show that systems behave as specified—could meaningfully secure the infrastructure on which artificial intelligence runs.
